languages.text: "Себериан погряз в ереси. Рано или поздно он падет. Я не желаю тратить силы на обреченного".

traits.locale_text: "Себериан погряз в ереси. Рано или поздно он падет. Я не желаю тратить силы на обречённого".

languages.text: "Seberian is mired in heresy. Sooner or later, he will fall. I do not wish to waste my efforts on a doomed man."
languages.original_text: "Себериан погряз в ереси. Рано или поздно он падет. Я не желаю тратить силы на обреченного".

traits.locale_text: "Seberian is mired in heresy. Sooner or later, he will fall. I do not wish to waste my efforts on a doomed man."
"Seberian is mired in heresy. Sooner or later, he will fall. I do not wish to waste my efforts on a doomed man."
"Seberian is mired in heresy. Sooner or later, he will fall. I do not wish to waste my efforts on a doomed man."

languages.text: “塞贝里安深陷异端泥潭。他迟早会垮台。我不想为一个注定灭亡的人白费心力。”
languages.original_text: "Seberian is mired in heresy. Sooner or later, he will fall. I do not wish to waste my efforts on a doomed man."

traits.locale_text: “塞贝里安深陷异端泥潭。他迟早会垮台。我不想为一个注定灭亡的人白费心力。”

languages.text: « Seberian baigne dans l'hérésie, à tel point qu'il tombera tôt ou tard. Je ne veux pas gaspiller mes efforts au service d'un homme condamné. »
languages.original_text: "Seberian is mired in heresy. Sooner or later, he will fall. I do not wish to waste my efforts on a doomed man."

traits.locale_text: « Seberian baigne dans l'hérésie, à tel point qu'il tombera tôt ou tard. Je ne veux pas gaspiller mes efforts au service d'un homme condamné. »

languages.text: "Seberian, kâfirliğe batmış durumda. Er ya da geç sonu gelecek. Çabalarımın mahkûm bir adam için boşa gitmesini istemiyorum."
languages.original_text: "Seberian is mired in heresy. Sooner or later, he will fall. I do not wish to waste my efforts on a doomed man."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian, kâfirliğe batmış durumda. Er ya da geç sonu gelecek. Çabalarımın mahkûm bir adam için boşa gitmesini istemiyorum."

languages.text: «Seberian está sumido en la herejía. No quiero desperdiciar mis esfuerzos con un condenado».
languages.original_text: "Seberian is mired in heresy. Sooner or later, he will fall. I do not wish to waste my efforts on a doomed man."

traits.locale_text: «Seberian está sumido en la herejía. No quiero desperdiciar mis esfuerzos con un condenado».

languages.text: "Seberian versinkt in Ketzerei. Früher oder später wird er fallen. Ich will meine Zeit nicht für einen Todgeweihten vergeuden."
languages.original_text: "Seberian is mired in heresy. Sooner or later, he will fall. I do not wish to waste my efforts on a doomed man."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian versinkt in Ketzerei. Früher oder später wird er fallen. Ich will meine Zeit nicht für einen Todgeweihten vergeuden."

languages.text: 「シベリアは異端の沼に足を取られている。早晩彼は転落する。私は、すでに滅びた男に力を注ぐことは望まない。」
languages.original_text: "Seberian is mired in heresy. Sooner or later, he will fall. I do not wish to waste my efforts on a doomed man."

traits.locale_text: 「シベリアは異端の沼に足を取られている。早晩彼は転落する。私は、すでに滅びた男に力を注ぐことは望まない。」
